invocation.policy: all user and assistant invocations call the compiled simplicio executable; skills, installers, chat contracts, and plugins are thin entry surfaces

orientation_pack.sqlite_role: Isa ranks project/user context and resolves path/offset/len; Helo supplies Simplicio runtime/function knowledge; mmap serves exact bytes
Isa ranks project/user context and resolves path/offset/len; Helo supplies Simplicio runtime/function knowledge; mmap serves exact bytes

neural_guardians.guardian_role: Simplicio runtime neural guardian for commands, capabilities, schemas, orchestration policy, and operational knowledge
neural_guardians.project_guardian_role: user/project neural guardian; Isa owns project context, user context, project memory retrieval, and talks to Helo for Simplicio runtime knowledge
neural_guardians.evolution_agent_role: binary external knowledge acquisition agent for GitHub skills, sites, articles, Reddit, news, X.com, forums, and governed assistant-CLI consultation
instruction_flow: simplicio routes user/project neural-memory access through Isa
Isa talks to Helo whenever the task needs Simplicio runtime, command, capability, schema, or orchestration knowledge
Helo retrieves Simplicio operational function knowledge from the runtime neural memory
Helo returns scoped instructions for Isa, Levi, or worker agents
workers execute only through deterministic Simplicio commands and write locks
neural_guardians.write_policy: agents do not read or write neural memory directly; project/user context requests go through Isa, runtime/function requests go through Helo, and all access uses Simplicio commands
neural_guardians.index_policy: commands, capabilities, adapters, schemas, skills, workflows, evidence, and decisions are indexed as governed neural knowledge with provenance; Isa owns project/user memory while Helo owns Simplicio operational memory
neural_guardians.handoff_policy: Isa and Helo may instruct other agents, but execution, mutation, validation, evidence, leases, and release still stay inside Simplicio

same_machine.copy_policy: zero-copy payload read from shared memory
same_machine.latency_target: sub-microsecond class when the host supports it

same_machine_fallback.transport: rtrb ring buffer in shared memory
same_machine_fallback.use_when: iceoryx2 is unavailable or a simpler local queue is enough

cross_machine.payload_policy: rkyv for binary events when both sides support it; Cap'n Proto schema when RPC compatibility is needed

neural_boundary.rule: IPC moves agent events and typed payloads only; project/user context still goes through Isa, and Simplicio runtime/function knowledge still goes through Helo

serialization.json_fallback: simplicio.* schema JSON for logs, CLI output, and external adapters

agent_ipc.policy: every new Simplicio agent uses this IPC policy by default; filesystem JSON remains the durable fallback and evidence ledger, not the fast path

parallelism.reason: capacity available: 20/20 logical agents active, 1 model worker(s)

commands.name: doctor
commands.summary: check runtime, policy, adapters, model, repo

commands.name: map
commands.summary: map repository context before broad reasoning

commands.name: plan
commands.summary: produce an adaptive plan without executing

commands.name: decide
commands.summary: route through Isa/Helo memory first and avoid LLM calls when confidence is high

commands.name: run
commands.summary: execute a task with validation and evidence

commands.name: sprint
commands.summary: schedule and run a sprint task graph

commands.name: resume
commands.summary: crash-safe resume of a previous run

commands.name: evidence
commands.summary: show run provenance and artifacts

commands.name: validate
commands.summary: emit the progressive validation plan

commands.name: task
commands.summary: normalize a task into simplicio.task/v1

commands.name: edit
commands.summary: apply a mechanical edit plan and optionally run build/render/assert checks

commands.name: savings
commands.summary: compare delivery with Simplicio vs a measured or estimated baseline

commands.name: computer-use
commands.summary: desktop capture/actions through explicit backend and approval policy

commands.name: agent
commands.summary: register workers, claim issue leases, heartbeat, release, and report the multi-agent board while keeping Codex/Claude behind the simplicio command surface

commands.name: status
commands.summary: live worker/queue/cache snapshot

commands.name: cache
commands.summary: inspect or clear the plan/prompt cache

commands.name: memory
commands.summary: rank and initialize local offline memory backends

commands.name: memory-db
commands.summary: describe the complementary neural-db-like memory contract

commands.name: skill-memory
commands.summary: show Hermes-style skill usage, provenance, bundles, and indexes

commands.name: orientation
commands.summary: prepare and inspect the Helo-governed zero-copy mmap pack for docs, schemas, examples, and orientation files

commands.name: parallelism
commands.summary: show max-safe parallel read/check/evidence lanes and write locks

commands.name: chat
commands.summary: answer from local runtime state or OpenAI/Anthropic compatible envelopes

commands.name: invoke
commands.summary: show every supported invocation surface with simplicio as canonical command

commands.name: advise
commands.summary: state runtime opinion, next action, selected skills, and compiled surface

commands.name: compiled
commands.summary: report the compiled-binary-first contract and release binary status

commands.name: cron
commands.summary: manage scheduled jobs using the compiled runtime cron store

commands.name: login
commands.summary: show disabled Google/Gmail login contract for future Stripe entitlement

commands.name: capabilities
commands.summary: list and rank tool, adapter, connector, and skill capability contracts

commands.name: skills
commands.summary: rank lazy skill metadata for a task

commands.name: learn
commands.summary: capture a reusable recipe from a run

commands.name: benchmark
commands.summary: run the baseline-vs-runtime harness

commands.name: intake
commands.summary: parse natural-language sprint intake and emit provider orientation for multi-agent issue loops
commands.example: simplicio intake "Use Simplicio to finish the issues/tasks from <link>" --json

commands.name: install
commands.summary: global install and assistant adapter setup

commands.name: serve
commands.summary: MCP / local-HTTP / stdio server mode

commands.name: adapters
commands.summary: resolve first-party adapter health

commands.name: update
commands.summary: schedule background compiled-only self-updates

commands.name: license
commands.summary: report free-now entitlement and disabled Stripe paid-update policy

commands.name: privacy
commands.summary: report what stays local vs may leave

commands.name: reasoning
commands.summary: choose no-llm/local/remote reasoning backend

commands.name: runtime
commands.summary: emit this LLM-readable resource map

commands.name: contracts
commands.summary: prove the standard read/write contract chain

commands.name: version
commands.summary: release manifest and component commits

standard_io.summary: mapper context -> prompt artifact -> dev-cli write/validate -> sprint evidence -> runtime final review

guardian_policy.project_guardian_role: user/project neural guardian; Isa owns project context, user context, project memory retrieval, and talks to Helo for Simplicio runtime knowledge
guardian_policy.evolution_agent_role: binary external knowledge acquisition agent for GitHub skills, sites, articles, Reddit, news, X.com, forums, and governed assistant-CLI consultation
instruction_flow: simplicio routes user/project neural-memory access through Isa
Isa talks to Helo whenever the task needs Simplicio runtime, command, capability, schema, or orchestration knowledge
Helo retrieves Simplicio operational function knowledge from the runtime neural memory
Helo returns scoped instructions for Isa, Levi, or worker agents
workers execute only through deterministic Simplicio commands and write locks
guardian_policy.write_policy: agents do not read or write neural memory directly; project/user context requests go through Isa, runtime/function requests go through Helo, and all access uses Simplicio commands
guardian_policy.index_policy: commands, capabilities, adapters, schemas, skills, workflows, evidence, and decisions are indexed as governed neural knowledge with provenance; Isa owns project/user memory while Helo owns Simplicio operational memory
guardian_policy.handoff_policy: Isa and Helo may instruct other agents, but execution, mutation, validation, evidence, leases, and release still stay inside Simplicio

backend_order.reason: lightest default for commands, files, Jira, logs, issues, names, and evidence
best offline neural-memory balance; keep SQLite and add semantic rerank
embedded/local option when the corpus grows or multimodal artifacts matter
robust offline vector search when a specialized retrieval layer is justified

write_policy: Isa is the gateway for project/user neural memory; Helo is the gateway for Simplicio runtime/function memory
orientation pack rebuilds are serialized generated writes
sqlite-vec semantic rerank when extension is installed
LanceDB/Qdrant only after corpus size justifies heavier backend
memory_backend.recommended_next: use SQLite FTS5 now; install sqlite-vec only when semantic recall is needed

limits.reason: capacity available: 20/20 logical agents active, 1 model worker(s)

editing.llm_role: orient, decompose, review, escalate, and produce structured plans
editing.note: provider sessions must not bypass Simplicio for code mutation

escalation.source: existing simplicio-prompt fan-out policy organized in simplicio-runtime

local_attempts.success_gate: focused validation, evidence, and taskflow pass; full suite is pre-commit only
local_attempts.failure_gate: focused validation failure, blocker, consensus failure, or incomplete evidence

local_attempts.success_gate: focused validation, evidence, and taskflow pass; full suite is pre-commit only
local_attempts.failure_gate: focused validation failure, blocker, consensus failure, or incomplete evidence

local_attempts.success_gate: focused validation, evidence, and taskflow pass; full suite is pre-commit only
local_attempts.failure_gate: focused validation failure, blocker, consensus failure, or incomplete evidence

local_attempts.success_gate: focused validation, evidence, and taskflow pass; full suite is pre-commit only
local_attempts.failure_gate: focused validation failure, blocker, consensus failure, or incomplete evidence

escalation.memory_guard: logical subagents share the governed local model pool; do not spawn raw llama.cpp workers outside Simplicio

paid_fallback.allowed_after: all local attempts 64, 100, 200, and 600 fail or remain blocked
paid_fallback.requires: explicit --remote or --allow-remote policy, configured paid provider, and recorded escalation evidence
paid_fallback.audit: record escalation reason, provider, cost, tests, and evidence in the source task and Simplicio board

llama_cpp_policy.reason: prevent llama.cpp memory spikes while allowing many logical agents to share one small local model pool

token_cost_guidance: prefer deterministic built-in tools first; use a local LLM second; escalate to a remote LLM only when the task genuinely needs it
examples: map before broad repo reasoning: simplicio map --repo . --json
task graph/status with sprint: simplicio sprint sprint.md --repo .
standard IO smoke chain: simplicio contracts smoke --json
local memory backend plan: simplicio memory status --json
zero-copy orientation pack: simplicio orientation pack --repo . --json
decided mechanical edit, zero tokens: simplicio edit --plan plan.json
background compiled update policy: simplicio update auto status --json

ownership.do_not_duplicate: reuse first-party adapters and built-in tools before adding new skills
